_comment: Single source of truth for genome validator bounds. Read by autoresearch.py (Python) AND genome.gd (GDScript). Drift between them is a class of bug (see failures/002 precedent + 2026-04-18 iter3 40min waste). chmod 444 + hook protect. To change: chmod +w, edit, chmod 444, commit.
_references: godot/sim/program.md § Genome 변수 정의 + 허용 범위
